name: serverless-state-machine-cqrs
description: CQRS and event-sourced agreement settlement on AWS SAM with idempotent commands, transactional outbox, and async SQS processing

scripts.lint: cd functions/create-agreement && npm run lint && cd ../transition-agreement && npm run lint && cd ../list-agreements && npm run lint && cd ../debug-events && npm run lint && cd ../list-ledger && npm run lint && cd ../../apps/ui && npm run lint
scripts.test: cd functions/create-agreement && npm test && cd ../transition-agreement && npm test && cd ../list-agreements && npm test && cd ../debug-events && npm test && cd ../list-ledger && npm test && cd ../../apps/ui && npm test
scripts.test:coverage: cd functions/create-agreement && npm run unit -- --coverage --runInBand && cd ../transition-agreement && npm run unit -- --coverage --runInBand && cd ../list-agreements && npm run unit -- --coverage --runInBand && cd ../debug-events && npm run unit -- --coverage --runInBand && cd ../list-ledger && npm run unit -- --coverage --runInBand && cd ../../apps/ui && npm run test:coverage
scripts.typecheck: cd layers/lambda-utils && npm run build && cd ../.. && cd functions/create-agreement && npm run compile && cd ../transition-agreement && npm run compile && cd ../list-agreements && npm run compile && cd ../debug-events && npm run compile && cd ../list-ledger && npm run compile && cd ../../apps/ui && npm run typecheck
